name: mas-scholar-skills
description: Repo-tracked Codex plugin for MAS Scholar Skills capability modules and medical-paper professional specialist skills.

interface.shortDescription: MAS medical-paper specialist skills and refs.
interface.longDescription: Provides the maintained professional Codex skills for MAS medical writing, review, figure, literature, statistics, table, and submission workflows, plus MAS Scholar Skills capability modules, standard opl scholar-skills CLI readbacks, refs-only materialized candidate packages, and MAS owner-gated authority boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use MAS Scholar Skills to inspect medical-paper capability modules.

Use medical-manuscript-writing, medical-manuscript-review, medical-figure-design, medical-statistical-review, medical-table-design, or medical-submission-prep for MAS medical-paper specialist workflows.
Use medical-research-lit to plan PubMed-backed literature discovery.
Check MAS Scholar Skills authority boundaries before a MAS handoff.
